---
title: "global documentation"
author: "Haley Faucher"
date: "2026-07-15"
---

# Best Practices for Global File
- Only add load statements for packages here
    - No load statements in any other app files
    - No install.packages(), user should do this before usage of app
- If other csv's are used, load them in here to a global variable, as these are referenced in other areas
- Other variables can be used here, but only if they are large enough/worth being globally referenced.
    - I keep the variables for the welcome, how-to-use, and methods pages here for this reason

- DO NOT add variables that are only accessed within server to this file
    - reactiveVars for logic, intermediate calculations, etc.
- Do not do any processing in this file, all of this should be done within the server
    - Environment set up should be done here, but likely is not/will not be necessary
